open_issues.reason: MPS dotted and mixed-format policy identifiers are not approved for normalized hierarchy handling in this repository.
The PDF does not expose bookmark outline entries through PyPDF2, so section ranges are seeded from the text table of contents and page inspection.
MPS dotted policy identifiers are preserved raw in v1.
